description_long: This is a robust, rectangular wooden desk with a rich, dark brown finish and a modern, angular design. The desk features a recessed central workspace with a built-in, retro-style computer terminal, including a metallic monitor and a green-lit keyboard embedded into the surface. The front of the desk is open, allowing legroom for a seated user, while the sides and back are solid panels of wood. The top surface is flat and wide, suitable for supporting additional objects or paperwork. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the desk a classic yet functional appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and a focus on technology integration.
description: A sturdy, dark wood desk with a built-in retro computer terminal and a recessed workspace, featuring a flat top and solid side panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open leg space, recessed workspace, and the built-in computer terminal with a visible monitor and keyboard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick wooden side panel and the profile of the computer terminal set into the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wooden back panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side panel and the embedded computer terminal from another angle.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the open front with legroom and direct access to the built-in computer terminal, while the solid panel is the back.
